about.title: The people who bring your projects to life
about.text: Sami da Silva Studio turns architecture and interior projects into hyper-realistic images. Every render is treated as a unique piece: composition, light and materials crafted to elevate the project and convince decision-makers.

services.title: From 3D model to final render
services.subtitle: Complete visualization solutions for architects, interior designers and builders.

items.title: 3D Modeling
items.description: Accurate modeling of your project from floor plans, sketches or CAD files.

items.title: Realistic Rendering
items.description: Hyper-realistic interior and exterior images, with lighting and materials true to the project.

items.title: Digital Mockup
items.description: Complete presentation of the development for sales, approval and marketing.

items.title: Detailing
items.description: Detailed sheets and views to take the project into execution with precision.

items.title: Applied AI
items.description: AI-powered workflows to explore project variations quickly.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.description: You send the project, references and goals. We align scope and timeline.

steps.title: Modeling
steps.description: We build the 3D model true to the project, with materials and lighting.

steps.title: Preview
steps.description: You receive previews to adjust camera, light and finishes.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Final render in high resolution, ready to present and publish.

portfolio.title: Featured projects
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of what went from blueprint to reality.

items.question: What is the average turnaround for a render?
items.answer: It depends on the complexity of the space and the number of images. After the briefing, you receive a schedule with preview and final delivery dates.

items.question: Which files do I need to send?
items.answer: Floor plans, 3D models (SKP, FBX, OBJ, BLEND) or even sketches and references. We review the material during the briefing and suggest the best path.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Terms are defined in the proposal, usually with a deposit to start and the balance upon final delivery.

items.question: Can I request changes?
items.answer: Yes. The preview stage exists exactly for that: camera, lighting and finishing adjustments before the final render.

items.question: In which formats do I receive the images?
items.answer: High-resolution images (JPG/PNG) ready for presentations, social media and print. Other formats can be arranged.

cta.title: Shall we bring your project to life?
cta.subtitle: Send us your project and receive a tailored proposal.

aboutPage.historyText: The studio was born from a passion for architecture and imagery. Today it serves architects, interior designers and builders who need to present their projects with maximum realism and impact.

values.title: Precision
values.description: Every detail of the project is respected, from furniture to light temperature.

values.title: Aesthetics
values.description: Composition and atmosphere crafted like architectural photography.

values.title: Deadlines
values.description: Clear schedules and deliveries as agreed.

values.title: Partnership
values.description: Close communication from start to finish.
